items.title: Haaland gives City edge over Arsenal in title race
items.summary: Erling Haaland helped Manchester City land a telling blow in the Premier League title race.

items.title: Premier League | Man City's Haaland nets winner against Arsenal to close gap in title race; Van Dijk clinches derby for Liverpool
items.summary: Manchester City are now three points behind Arsenal with a game in hand, as the Gunners once again slip up with just five games of the season remaining
